raw_consumer_statement: I had a {$15000.00} fraudulent charge hit on a new credit card that I had just received. I hadnt even opened the envelope. The card was never activated and yet someone charged {$15000.00} immediately! I only learned of the charge because I received an email alert from my XXXX credit monitoring account. This was one fraudulent charge of {$15000.00}. The credit card company is Barclays. Barclays has been notified right away that it was fraud and the card hadnt even been activated. They said they would remove the charge. But I have no proof that they removed the fraudulent charge. I spent over four hours on the phone with them trying to get this resolved. They wouldnt even give me a number to their fraud security department. The one number they did provide me was a bogus number! Now a maxed out credit card account is showing up on my credit report and my credit score dropped XXXX points because Barclays reported I had a maxed out new credit card with a {$15000.00} charge. One charge!! XXXX has already been notified as well as XXXX and XXXX. How do I proceed and to have this fraud corrected and resolved as it has negatively affected my good credit rating. Im also in the process of purchasing a car! This could completely affect the ability to purchase a car thats being shipped from XXXX next week.
